User.title: User
User.description: A citizen user profile recording municipal points and badges.

points.description: Municipal impact points earned from valid reports.

homeArea.description: The neighborhood or suburb area name of the user.

Issue.title: Issue
Issue.description: A civic issue submitted by a citizen, verified and categorized by AI.

reporterHandle.description: The handle of the citizen who reported the issue.

photoUrl.description: The Firebase Storage download URL for the attached image.

description.description: The raw description submitted by the user.

clean_description.description: A refined, professional summary generated by Gemini.

category.description: The issue category: pothole, streetlight, garbage, water_leak, or other.

severity.description: The issue severity: low, medium, or high.

is_authentic.description: Flag indicating if the photo is authentic and not fake.

is_spam.description: Flag indicating if the report is spam.

hidden.description: Flag indicating if this report is hidden/filtered from the public feed.

area.description: The resolved area or neighborhood name from Nominatim reverse-geocoding.

status.description: The resolution workflow status: reported, verified, in_progress, resolved.

upvotedBy.description: Array of user IDs who upvoted to prevent double voting.

comments.description: Array of comments posted by the community.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the issue was filed.
